name: jardiscore/kernel
description: Infrastructure kernel for PHP — an immutable DomainKernel holding wired-up cache, logger, event dispatcher, HTTP client, database, mailer and filesystem, plus an optional ENV-driven bootstrap. Jardis-generated domain code reaches it through a single interface.

suggest.jardisadapter/cache: For multi-layer caching (Memory, Redis, Database) via the Bootstrap-Packer
suggest.jardisadapter/dbconnection: For ConnectionPool with read/write splitting, health checks and load balancing
suggest.jardisadapter/eventdispatcher: For PSR-14 event dispatching via the Bootstrap-Packer
suggest.jardisadapter/filesystem: For local and S3 filesystem abstraction via the Bootstrap-Packer
suggest.jardisadapter/http: For PSR-18 HTTP client with handler pipeline via the Bootstrap-Packer
suggest.jardisadapter/logger: For log handlers (File, Console, Redis, Database, etc.) via the Bootstrap-Packer
suggest.jardisadapter/mailer: For SMTP mailer with STARTTLS, AUTH, HTML/text, attachments via the Bootstrap-Packer
suggest.ext-redis: For Redis-based caching and logging via the Bootstrap-Packer
